title: Tick 19: mark D5 done after outcomes pull 11 merged and ship D6 --check-urls flag in opensubagents outcomes pull 12
question: Does the QUEUE row D5 flip from in_progress to done now that opensubagents outcomes pull 11 has merged and does opensubagents outcomes pull 12 land the optional --check-urls flag on open-outcome verify with the deterministic default preserved and tests passing?
success_criteria: QUEUE row D5 flipped in_progress to done with the merged opensubagents outcomes pull 11 URL preserved as the runroc
opensubagents outcomes pull 12 opened with auto-merge armed adding the --check-urls flag to the verify subcommand
the --check-urls flag is off by default keeping HeuristicVerifier verify pure per Section 2.1.2
two new pytest tests pass plus the existing 27 covering 29 total with the new tests asserting both the downgrade-on-4xx path and the off-by-default invariant

capabilities: D5 row flipped done after outcomes pull 11 merge
outcomes pull 12 opened with auto-merge armed for D6
HeuristicVerifier verify remains pure with URL check in CLI layer only
